repos.name: alvinreal/awesome-opensource-ai
repos.description: Curated list of the best truly open-source AI projects, models, tools, and infrastructure.
repos.desc_cn: 汇集了众多优秀的开源AI项目
highlights: Curated list of the best truly open-source AI projects, models, tools, and infrastructure.

takeaway: 今天的开源趋势显示，AI记忆系统和本地运行的AI工具受到关注，同时，全面的AI工程知识和多平台接入的翻译工具也在增长。
